file_insights.purpose: Automated CI pipeline for Android project
key_components: Lint checks with HTML report generation
Unit test execution with report collection

patterns_discovered.description: All three jobs repeat identical setup steps: checkout, JDK setup, and gradlew permission grant
All jobs upload artifacts for inspection and debugging with 7-day retention
patterns_discovered.details: APK, lint HTML reports, and test reports are captured for CI artifacts

patterns_discovered.description: Uses 'if: always()' condition on lint and test report uploads
patterns_discovered.purpose: Ensures reports are captured even when tests fail

patterns_discovered.benefit: Better error diagnostics in CI logs

patterns_discovered.description: Setup-java action configured with cache: gradle
patterns_discovered.benefit: Faster subsequent builds by caching dependencies

gotchas_discovered.description: Checkout, JDK setup, and gradlew chmod steps are repeated verbatim in all 3 jobs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Maintenance burden, harder to update versions/configuration

gotchas_discovered.description: APK upload assumes 'app' module and debug build output structure
gotchas_discovered.impact: Workflow breaks if project structure changes or uses different module names

gotchas_discovered.description: Lint artifact path uses 'lint-results-*.html' pattern without verification
gotchas_discovered.impact: May fail silently if lint output path or format differs from expected

gotchas_discovered.description: All three jobs run in parallel without explicit dependencies
gotchas_discovered.impact: Workflow continues even if build fails before lint/test runs; unclear job sequencing

gotchas_discovered.description: JDK 17 is hardcoded with no parameterization or matrix strategy
gotchas_discovered.impact: No multi-version testing; must edit file to test different JDK versions

approach_outcome.completeness: All three required jobs implemented (build, lint, test)
approach_outcome.functionality: Workflow provides complete CI pipeline with artifact collection
approach_outcome.code_quality: Clean structure with appropriate GitHub Actions conventions
approach_outcome.issues: Code duplication present but functionality is intact

recommendations.suggestion: Extract common setup steps into a reusable workflow or composite action
recommendations.benefit: Reduces 15+ lines of duplication, improves maintainability

recommendations.suggestion: Add job dependencies to ensure proper execution order
recommendations.benefit: Build should complete before lint/test; clearer workflow semantics
recommendations.implementation: Add 'needs: [build]' to lint and test jobs if build must pass first

recommendations.suggestion: Use matrix strategy for multi-version testing
recommendations.benefit: Test against multiple JDK versions or API levels

recommendations.suggestion: Parameterize hardcoded paths or add path validation
recommendations.benefit: Workflow remains functional if app structure changes
recommendations.implementation: Use gradle properties or add conditional checks before upload

recommendations.suggestion: Add workflow status notifications or failure comments on PRs
recommendations.benefit: Better visibility into CI failures for developers
recommendations.implementation: Add action for Slack/email notifications or PR comments on failure
